entities.name: Costly Signaling
entities.context: Principle that high-effort reflection is a more reliable indicator of candidate quality than low-cost signals like resumes

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company whose top-of-funnel should prioritize effort-based signals over data-based signals

entities.name: story-based reflection
entities.context: Deep reflection process requiring significant time and cognitive effort that acts as a natural filter for candidates

entities.name: process compliance
entities.context: Proxy indicator for underlying traits like conscientiousness and self-awareness

entities.name: conscientiousness
entities.context: Character trait that high-friction processes select for

entities.name: self-awareness
entities.context: Character trait that reflective capacity requirements select for

relationships.context: Story-based reflection is an application of the Costly Signaling principle
Careerspan's hiring methodology is built on this principle
Process compliance serves as a proxy for conscientiousness
Process compliance serves as a proxy for self-awareness
Completing story-based reflection demonstrates process compliance
